task: I need to text a coworker about covering my section for the last hour because something came up. Can you help me put together a message that gets the point across clearly and doesn’t overcomplicate it?

turns.agent_response:
Sure — here’s a clean text you can send:

“Hey, something came up and I need you to cover my section for the last hour if you can. I’d really appreciate it. Let me know if that works.”

If you want, I can make it:
- more casual
- more firm
- or shorter and more direct

user_simulator.text: Yeah, that works. Short, clear, no drama.
